title: G Rated Maps
description: a mod that stops maps from rending and makes them blank. its plug and play put into your mods folder in .minecraft and load up with version 1.21.4 and your safe from map arts on any anarchy server fully made by ai! i did not write a single line of code!
body:
(Fabric 1.21.4)
A lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.4 built with Gradle Loom. Requires Fabric Loader 0.16.9 and Fabric API 0.110.0+1.21.4. Download the JAR from the release Assets and drop it into your mods folder.
Requirements
Minecraft 1.21.4
Fabric Loader 0.16.9
Fabric API 0.110.0+1.21.4
sodium-fabric-0.6.13+mc1.21.4.jar
